item.ptxt: Prolonged and repeated contact with engine oil will result in the removal of natural oils from the skin, leading to dryness, irritation and dermatitis. In addition, used engine oil contains potentially harmful contaminants which may cause skin cancer.

Precautions should be taken when replacing engine oil to minimize the risk of your skin making contact with used engine oil. Protective clothing and gloves that cannot be penetrated by oil should be worn. The skin should be washed with soap and water, or use water-less hand cleaner, to remove any used engine oil thoroughly. Do not use gasoline, thinners, or solvents.
In order to preserve the environment, used oil and used oil filters must be disposed of at designated disposal sites.

s2.ptxt: Remove the oil filler cap.
Remove the oil drain plug and drain the oil into a container.
Connect the hose with an inside diameter of 15 mm (0.59 in.) to the pipe.
Remove the oil filter drain plug from the oil filter cap.
Insert the pipe with the hose into the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Be sure to insert the pipe with the O-ring installed on the oil filter cap side.

atten4.ptxt: Place the hose end into a container before draining the oil from the hose.

s2.ptxt: Make sure that oil is completely drained, and remove the pipe and O-ring.

atten4.ptxt: Be sure to turn the pipe in the direction of the arrow to remove it.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the oil filter cap.
Remove the oil filter element and O-ring from the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use any tools to remove the O-ring in order to prevent the cap from being damaged. Be sure to remove it by hand.

s2.ptxt: Clean the inside of the oil filter cap, threads, and O-ring groove.
Apply a light coat of engine oil to a new O-ring and install it to the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the O-ring does not get twisted on the groove.

s2.ptxt: Install a new oil filter element to the oil filter cap.
Remove all dirt and foreign matter from the installation surface and the inside of the cap on the engine side.
Apply a light coat of engine oil to the O-ring again and install the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the O-ring does not get caught between the parts.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, install the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that there is no clearance between the parts after tightening the oil filter cap.

s2.ptxt: Apply a light coat of engine oil to a new O-ring and install it to the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Remove all dirt and foreign matter from the installation surface.

s2.ptxt: Install the oil filter drain plug to the oil filter cap.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the O-ring does not get caught between the parts.

s2.ptxt: Clean and install the oil drain plug with a new gasket
Add new oil.

entry.ptxt: Drain and refill with oil filter change
Drain and refill without oil filter change

s2.ptxt: Install the oil filler cap.
Start the engine. Check for engine oil leaks from the connected parts of the oil filter cap and oil filter drain plug.
